subtitle: Marie away all week, James absent until 18 June, multiple handovers to action
context: Marie Cooksey is on annual leave 8-12 June and James Salas Guillen is absent until Thursday 18 June - both handover documents are in your inbox and require immediate review. The DSE data import to Cardinus is now live (status confirmed by James on 5 June at 10:58) but Marie's question about manual contractor record creation remains unanswered and is blocking full sign-off. DTP1092 College Staff in PXD Proposal has multiple open comments from Marie and Simon Burford awaiting your review and closure. Michael O'Sullivan returned from leave this morning and has sent context on the Volunteering Days pilot. The most time-critical deadline this week is the Strategic H&S Modular System (SHSMS) weightings evaluation discussion with Helen Harbour - date not yet locked but marked urgent. Open first: the Marie Handover document to understand H&S queue coverage and which Marie-dependent items need independent action this week.
